response.overview: Little Red Riding Hood leaves home with a basket of sweets for her grandmother, who lives on the other side of the great forest. Along the way, she meets the wolf, who suggests a race between the two of them to her grandmother's hut. The wolf arrives first, of course, and after throwing her grandmother under the bed, he puts on the old lady's nightwear and waits for Little Red Riding Hood. He's about to eat the little girl when the woodcutters arrive and kill him.
response.title: Little Red Riding Hood
